meaning: 旺兹沃思[英国英格兰东南部城市](在大伦敦郡的西南部)
examples: persuaded Wandsworth council to buy and lease back the building;
There was a girl found strangled with a piece of barbed wire at Wandsworth last week.
Asked if manager Arsene Wenger had spoken to him after the game, the Wandsworth born youngster revealed his managers words of encouragement.
He served just 15 months before escaping Wandsworth prison in 1965 and fleeing to Brazil.
Jessie Flower, who died in 2011, left the gift to Lord Wandsworth College's foundation charity.
